name: sjlillian
html:
sjlillian
!!!
css: .pika-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #1a1a2e 0%, #0f0f1a 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .pika-wrap::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 40%, rgba(255,220,0,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%); animation: pika-glow-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes pika-glow-pulse { from { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(0.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.05); } } .pika { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; animation: pika-bounce 0.4s ease-in-out infinite alternate; position: relative; } @keyframes pika-bounce { from { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-3deg); } to { transform: translateY(-6%) rotate(3deg); } } .pika-ear { position: absolute; width: 18%; height: 22%; background: #FFD700; border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0; top: -12%; z-index: 1; } .pika-ear::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 50%; height: 60%; background: #FF6B6B; border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0; top: 20%; left: 25%; } .pika-ear-left { left: 2%; transform: rotate(-20deg); } .pika-ear-right { right: 2%; transform: rotate(20deg); } .pika-head { width: 60%; aspect-ratio: 1/0.85; background: #FFD700; border-radius: 50% 50% 45% 45%; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,215,0,0.6), 0 0 40px rgba(255,215,0,0.3); } .pika-eye { position: absolute; width: 22%; aspect-ratio: 1; background: #111; border-radius: 50%; top: 28%; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: flex-start; padding: 4%; box-sizing: border-box; animation: pika-eye-widen 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pika-eye-widen { 0%, 60% { transform: scaleY(1); } 30% { transform: scaleY(1.3); } 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } } .pika-eye-left { left: 15%; } .pika-eye-right { right: 15%; } .pika-pupil { width: 45%; height: 45%; background: #000; border-radius: 50%; } .pika-shine { width: 30%; height: 30%; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; position: absolute; top: 10%; right: 10%; } .pika-cheek { position: absolute; width: 20%; aspect-ratio: 1; background: rgba(255,80,80,0.7); border-radius: 50%; top: 54%; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,80,80,0.6); } .pika-cheek-left { left: 6%; } .pika-cheek-right { right: 6%; } .pika-mouth { position: absolute; bottom: 10%; width: 40%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .pika-mouth-top { width: 100%; height: 3px; background: #333; border-radius: 2px 2px 0 0; } .pika-mouth-bottom { width: 110%; height: 18px; background: #333; border-radius: 0 0 50% 50%; margin-top: -1px; overflow: hidden; } .pika-mouth-bottom::after { content: ''; display: block; width: 60%; height: 70%; background: #FF6B6B; border-radius: 50%; margin: 0 auto; } .pika-body { width: 50%; height: 18%; background: #FFD700; border-radius: 30% 30% 50% 50%; position: relative; margin-top: -2%; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(255,215,0,0.4); } .pika-body::before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 80%; height: 60%; background: #e8b800; border-radius: 30%; bottom: 10%; left: 10%; } .pika-tail { position: absolute; right: -30%; top: -40%; width: 50%; height: 80%; background: #FFD700; clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 80% 100%, 20% 100%, 0% 50%); transform: rotate(30deg); } .pika-name { color: #FFD700; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(10px, 3.5vw, 22px); letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #FFD700, 0 0 20px #FFD700, 0 0 4px #fff; margin-top: 4%; text-transform: uppercase; animation: pika-name-flicker 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pika-name-flicker { 0%, 90%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 92% { opacity: 0.6; } 95% { opacity: 1; } 97% { opacity: 0.7; } } .pika-shock { position: absolute; top: 4%; right: 4%; color: #fff; font-size: clamp(12px, 4vw, 28px); font-weight: 900; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff4444, 0 0 20px #ff0000; animation: pika-shock-pop 0.6s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes pika-shock-pop { from { transform: scale(1) rotate(-10deg); opacity: 0.8; } to { transform: scale(1.3) rotate(10deg); opacity: 1; } }
